text.title: Performance Domains Overview Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example demonstrating a clean application of Performance Domains Overview, anchored to the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

example.title: Performance Domains Overview — clean application
example.note: orion-platform Q2 — 8 domains scored avg 3.1; planning 2 -> remediation by Iryna 2026-06-07; uncertainty 2 -> remediation by Marko 2026-06-14.
